The framework demonstrates that it is possible to create richer interaction scenarios compared to traditional static 3D models, paving the way for more immersive content creation.

zh.title: 将静态3D世界变为可编辑互动场景的革命性框架
zh.desc: WorldAct框架将静态的3D生成环境转变为可编辑和互动的场景。它通过多模态代理和几何重建技术，实现了对场景的分解和可操作对象的识别。该框架支持对象级编辑、碰撞感知操作和任务执行，同时保持全局场景的一致性。实验结果表明，WorldAct能够提供比原始生成场景更丰富的互动场景，展示了可编辑和互动3D世界模型的实际应用前景。

papers.title: Agentic Discovery of Neural Architectures: AIRA-Compose and AIRA-Design
papers.abstract: Abstract AI agents autonomously design foundation models exceeding standard Transformers through dual frameworks that optimize both architectural search and mechanistic implementation, achieving superior performance and efficiency.  AI-generated summary Toward recursive self-improvement, we investigate LLM agents autonomously designing foundation models beyond standard Transformers. We introduce a dual-framework approach: AIRA-Compose for high-level architecture search, and AIRA-Design for low-level mechanistic implementation. AIRA-Compose uses 11 agents to explore fundamental computational primitives under a 24-hour budget. Agents evaluate million-parameter candidates, extrapolating top designs to 350M, 1B, and 3B scales. This yields 14 architectures across two families: AIRAformers (Transformer-based) and AIRAhybrids (Transformer-Mamba). Pre-trained at 1B scale, these consistently outperform Llama 3.2 and Composer-found baselines. On downstream tasks, AIRAformer-D and AIRAhybrid-D improve accuracy by 2.4% and 3.8% over Llama 3.2. Furthermore, AIRA-Compose finds models with highly efficient scaling frontiers: AIRAformer-C scales 54% and 71% faster than Llama 3.2 and Composer's best Transformer, while AIRAhybrid-C outscales Nemotron-2 by 23% and Composer's best hybrid by 37%. AIRA-Design tasks 20 agents with writing novel attention mechanisms for long-range dependencies and high-performing training scripts. On the Long Range Arena benchmark, agent-designed architectures reach within 2.3% and 2.6% of human state-of-the-art on document matching and text classification. On the Autoresearch benchmark, Greedy Opus 4.5 achieves 0.968 validation bits-per-byte under a fixed time budget, surpassing the published minimum. Together, these frameworks show AI agents can autonomously discover architectures and algorithmic optimizations matching or surpassing hand-designed baselines. This establishes a powerful paradigm for discovering next-generation foundation models, marking a clear step toward recursive self-improvement.

ru.title: AI-агенты проектируют превосходящие трансформеры модели через автоматический поиск архитектуры
ru.desc: В статье представлен двойной фреймворк AIRA для автономного проектирования фундаментальных моделей с помощью LLM-агентов. AIRA-Compose осуществляет поиск архитектуры на высоком уровне, исследуя вычислительные примитивы, а AIRA-Design занимается низкоуровневой оптимизацией механизмов внимания и скриптов обучения. Полученные модели AIRAformers и AIRAhybrids превосходят Llama 3.2 и другие базовые модели по точности и эффективности масштабирования. Это работа демонстрирует возможность автоматического открытия архитектур нейросетей, приближая развитие рекурсивного самосовершенствования AI систем.

en.title: AI Agents Redefining Model Design for Superior Performance
en.desc: This paper presents a novel approach where AI agents autonomously design advanced foundation models that outperform traditional Transformers. It introduces a dual-framework system, AIRA-Compose for high-level architecture search and AIRA-Design for low-level implementation, enabling efficient exploration of model designs. The agents evaluate numerous candidates and produce architectures that significantly enhance performance on various tasks, achieving better accuracy and faster scaling than existing models. This research highlights the potential of AI-driven self-improvement in creating next-generation machine learning models.

zh.title: AI代理自主设计超越Transformer的基础模型
zh.desc: 本论文介绍了一种新的双框架方法，AI代理能够自主设计超越标准Transformer的基础模型。AIRA-Compose负责高层次的架构搜索，而AIRA-Design则专注于低层次的机制实现。通过这两个框架，AI代理能够评估数百万个参数的候选模型，并在多个规模上实现优越的性能和效率。研究结果表明，这些自主设计的模型在多个下游任务中表现优于现有的基准模型，展示了AI在基础模型设计中的潜力。

papers.title: Look Before You Leap: Autonomous Exploration for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Abstract Agents trained with standard reinforcement learning exhibit narrow behaviors due to premature exploitation, but systematic exploration training improves adaptability and real-world performance.  AI-generated summary Large language model based agents often fail in unfamiliar environments due to premature exploitation: a tendency to act on prior knowledge before acquiring sufficient environment-specific information. We identify autonomous exploration as a critical yet underexplored capability for building adaptive agents. To formalize and quantify this capability, we introduce Exploration Checkpoint Coverage, a verifiable metric that measures how broadly an agent discovers key states, objects, and affordances. Our systematic evaluation reveals that agents trained with standard task-oriented reinforcement learning consistently exhibit narrow and repetitive behaviors that impede downstream performance. To address this limitation, we develop a training strategy that interleaves task-execution rollouts and exploration rollouts, with each type of rollout optimized by its corresponding verifiable reward. Building on this training strategy, we propose the Explore-then-Act paradigm, which decouples information-gathering from task execution: agents first utilize an interaction budget to acquire grounded environmental knowledge, then leverage it for task resolution. Our results demonstrate that learning to systematically explore is imperative for building generalizable and real-world-ready agents.
affiliations: University of Science and Technology of China

ru.title: Исследование перед действием: путь к адаптивным агентам
ru.desc: В статье исследуется проблема преждевременной эксплуатации в агентах на основе больших языковых моделей, которые не способны адаптироваться к незнакомым окружениям. Авторы вводят метрику Exploration Checkpoint Coverage для оценки того, насколько широко агент исследует ключевые состояния и возможности среды. Предлагается новая стратегия обучения с подкреплением, которая чередует раунды выполнения задач и раунды исследования, оптимизируя каждый тип отдельной функцией награды. Разработанная парадигма Explore-then-Act разделяет фазы сбора информации и выполнения задач, что позволяет агентам лучше обобщаться и работать в реальных условиях.

en.title: Explore First, Act Better!
en.desc: This paper addresses the limitations of agents trained with standard reinforcement learning, which often rely too heavily on prior knowledge and fail to adapt in new environments. It introduces the concept of autonomous exploration as a vital capability for enhancing agent adaptability. The authors propose a new metric called Exploration Checkpoint Coverage to measure how well agents discover important states and objects in their environment. They also present a training strategy that separates exploration from task execution, allowing agents to gather necessary information before performing tasks, leading to improved performance in real-world scenarios.

zh.title: 探索优先，提升智能体适应性
zh.desc: 本论文探讨了标准强化学习训练的智能体在面对新环境时表现出的狭窄行为，主要是由于过早利用已有知识。我们提出了自主探索作为提升智能体适应性的重要能力，并引入了探索检查点覆盖这一可验证的指标来量化这一能力。通过系统评估，我们发现传统任务导向的强化学习训练导致智能体行为重复且狭窄，影响其后续表现。为了解决这一问题，我们开发了一种新的训练策略，结合任务执行和探索的回合，提出了先探索后行动的范式，以提高智能体在真实世界中的表现。

papers.title: Learning from Failures: Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization with Verifiable Rewards
papers.abstract: Abstract Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization extends reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards by converting failed trajectories into correction supervision, improving reasoning capabilities and error correction in language models.  AI-generated summary Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. However, RLVR training is often hindered by sparse binary rewards and weak credit assignment, resulting in ambiguous optimization signals and underutilization of the useful information embedded in failed trajectories. To address this challenge, we propose Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization (CIPO), a simple and effective extension to RLVR that converts on-policy failed trajectories into correction-oriented supervision, without relying on any external signals. By jointly optimizing correction samples derived from the model's own failed attempts together with the standard RLVR objective, CIPO improves learning effectiveness while explicitly enhancing the model's ability to correct its own errors. Extensive experiments across 11 benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning and code generation demonstrate that CIPO consistently and significantly outperforms strong baselines in both reasoning and correction performance. Moreover, CIPO yields stronger pass@K gains, indicating that it improves the model's intrinsic reasoning capacity rather than merely redistributing probability mass over existing correct answers.
affiliations: Chinese Information Processing Laboratory, Institute of Software, Chinese Academy of Sciences
University of Chinese Academy of Sciences

ru.title: Превращаем ошибки в знания: оптимизация политики через коррекцию
ru.desc: В статье предложен метод Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization (CIPO), который расширяет обучение с подкреплением путём преобразования неудачных траекторий в сигналы коррекции. Основная проблема традиционного RLVR заключается в разреженности бинарных вознаграждений и слабом распределении кредита между шагами, что приводит к неоптимальным сигналам обучения. CIPO совместно оптимизирует образцы коррекции из собственных ошибок модели вместе со стандартной целью RLVR, не требуя внешних сигналов. Экспериментальные результаты на 11 бенчмарках показывают значительное улучшение способности языковых моделей к математическому рассуждению, генерации кода и самокоррекции ошибок.

en.title: Transforming Failures into Learning: CIPO for Enhanced Reasoning
en.desc: Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization (CIPO) enhances reinforcement learning by using failed attempts as a source of correction supervision. This method addresses the limitations of sparse rewards and weak credit assignment in traditional Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). By optimizing both correction samples from the model's own errors and the standard RLVR objectives, CIPO improves the model's learning efficiency and error correction capabilities. Experiments show that CIPO significantly outperforms existing methods in reasoning tasks and enhances the model's intrinsic reasoning ability.

zh.title: 纠正导向策略优化：提升模型推理与修正能力的利器
zh.desc: 本文提出了一种名为纠正导向策略优化（CIPO）的新方法，旨在增强强化学习中的可验证奖励机制。CIPO通过将失败的轨迹转化为纠正监督，来改善语言模型的推理能力和错误修正能力。与传统的稀疏奖励机制不同，CIPO利用模型自身的失败尝试来优化学习过程，从而提高学习效果。实验结果表明，CIPO在多个基准测试中显著优于现有的强基线，提升了模型的推理和纠正性能。

papers.title: Efficient Image Synthesis with Sphere Latent Encoder
papers.abstract: Abstract A decoupled framework for few-step image generation that improves efficiency and performance by separating pixel-space operations from latent denoising training.  AI-generated summary Few-step image generation has seen rapid progress, with consistency and meanflow-based methods significantly reducing the number of sampling steps. Despite their low inference cost, these approaches often suffer from training instability and limited scalability. Sphere Encoder is a recent alternative that produces high-quality images in only a few steps; however, it requires repeated transitions between the pixel space and latent space during inference while jointly optimizing reconstruction and generation within a single architecture. This design leads to computational inefficiency and objective conflict between reconstruction and generation. To address these limitations, we decouple the framework into a fixed pretrained image encoder and a separate latent denoising model trained entirely in a spherical latent space. Our approach eliminates repeated pixel-space operations during training and inference, improving efficiency and allowing reconstruction and generation to specialize independently. On Animal-Faces, Oxford-Flowers and ImageNet-1K datasets, our method significantly outperforms Sphere Encoder in both generation quality and inference speed, while achieving competitive results against strong few-step and multi-step baselines.
affiliations: Mohamed Bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence, UAE

ru.title: Раздельная архитектура для эффективной генерации изображений в несколько шагов
ru.desc: Работа предлагает развязанную архитектуру для быстрой генерации изображений, которая отделяет операции в пиксельном пространстве от обучения шумоподавления в скрытом пространстве. Авторы используют фиксированный предварительно обученный кодировщик изображений и отдельную модель диффузии, работающую исключительно в сферическом латентном пространстве. Такой подход устраняет повторяющиеся переходы между пространствами и позволяет функциям реконструкции и генерации специализироваться независимо друг от друга. На датасетах Animal-Faces, Oxford-Flowers и ImageNet-1K метод достигает лучшего качества генерации и скорости инференса по сравнению с Sphere Encoder и конкурирует с сильными baseline-ами для быстрой генерации.

en.title: Decoupling for Efficient Few-Step Image Generation
en.desc: This paper presents a new framework for generating images in just a few steps by separating the processes of pixel-space operations and latent denoising training. The proposed method uses a fixed pretrained image encoder alongside a distinct latent denoising model that operates in a spherical latent space. This separation enhances computational efficiency and allows the reconstruction and generation tasks to optimize independently, avoiding conflicts that arise in previous models. The results show that this approach significantly improves image quality and inference speed compared to existing methods, including the Sphere Encoder.

zh.title: 解耦框架提升少步图像生成效率
zh.desc: 本文提出了一种解耦框架，用于少步图像生成，旨在提高效率和性能。通过将像素空间操作与潜在去噪训练分开，我们的模型在训练和推理过程中消除了重复的像素空间操作。该方法在Animal-Faces、Oxford-Flowers和ImageNet-1K数据集上表现出色，生成质量和推理速度均显著优于Sphere Encoder。我们的研究表明，解耦设计可以使重建和生成过程独立优化，从而提高整体性能。

papers.title: Learning POMDP World Models from Observations with Language-Model Priors
papers.abstract: Abstract Pinductor uses language model priors to efficiently learn POMDP models from limited observation-action data, matching performance of methods with privileged hidden state access while outperforming traditional tabular approaches.  AI-generated summary Whether navigating a building, operating a robot, or playing a game, an agent that acts effectively in an environment must first learn an internal model of how that environment works. Partially-observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) provide a flexible modeling class for such internal world models, but learning them from observation-action trajectories alone is challenging and typically requires extensive environment interaction. We ask whether language-model priors can reduce costly interaction by leveraging prior knowledge, and introduce Pinductor (POMDP-inductor): an LLM proposes candidate POMDP models from a few observation-action trajectories and iteratively refines them to optimize a belief-based likelihood score. Despite using strictly less information, Pinductor matches the performance and sample efficiency of LLM-based POMDP learning methods that assume privileged access to the hidden state, while significantly surpassing the sample efficiency of tabular POMDP baselines. Further results show that performance scales with LLM capability and degrades gracefully as semantic information about the environment is withheld. Together, these results position language-model priors as a practical tool for sample-efficient world-model learning under partial observability, and a step toward generalist agents in real-world environments. Code is available at https://github.com/atomresearch/pinductor.
affiliations: Max Planck Institute for Intelligent Systems

ru.title: Языковые модели для эффективного обучения скрытым моделям мира
ru.desc: В работе предложен метод Pinductor, который использует предварительно обученные языковые модели для эффективного обучения моделей POMDP (частично наблюдаемые марковские процессы принятия решений) с ограниченным количеством данных наблюдений и действий. Языковая модель предлагает кандидатов моделей POMDP на основе нескольких траекторий взаимодействия, а затем итеративно улучшает их, оптимизируя функцию правдоподобия на основе байесовских убеждений агента. Метод достигает качества обучения, сравнимого с методами, имеющими привилегированный доступ к скрытому состоянию среды, при этом значительно превосходя выборочную эффективность табличных базовых моделей. Результаты демонстрируют, что производительность метода масштабируется с возможностями языковой модели и может служить практическим инструментом для обучения моделей окружающей среды в условиях частичной наблюдаемости.

en.title: Pinductor: Efficient Learning of POMDPs with Language Model Priors
en.desc: Pinductor is a method that uses language model priors to learn Partially-Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) from limited data. It allows agents to create internal models of their environments without needing extensive interaction, which is usually required for traditional learning methods. By proposing and refining candidate POMDP models based on observation-action data, Pinductor achieves high performance and sample efficiency. This approach demonstrates that leveraging language models can significantly enhance the learning process in environments where not all information is visible.

zh.title: 利用语言模型提升POMDP学习效率
zh.desc: Pinductor是一种利用语言模型先验知识来高效学习部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）模型的方法。它能够从有限的观察-行动数据中提取信息，匹配那些假设可以访问隐藏状态的学习方法的性能。与传统的表格方法相比，Pinductor在样本效率上表现更优，能够在较少的环境交互中学习有效的内部模型。研究结果表明，Pinductor的性能与语言模型的能力相关，并且在环境信息缺失时仍能保持良好的表现。

papers.title: HodgeCover: Higher-Order Topological Coverage Drives Compression of Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
papers.abstract: Abstract A novel compression approach for sparse mixture-of-experts layers uses harmonic kernel analysis from simplicial topology to identify optimal expert merging patterns, enabling efficient inference without retraining.  AI-generated summary Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers route tokens through a handful of experts, and learning-free compression of these layers reduces inference cost without retraining. A subtle obstruction blocks every existing compressor in this family: three experts can each be pairwise compatible yet form an irreducible cycle when merged together, so any score that ranks experts on pairwise signals is structurally blind to which triples are jointly mergeable. We show the obstruction is a precise mathematical object, the harmonic kernel of the simplicial Laplacian on a 2-complex whose vertices are experts, whose edges carry KL merge barriers, and whose faces carry triplet barriers; Hodge-decomposing the edge-barrier signal isolates the kernel exactly. We turn the diagnostic into a selection objective: HodgeCover greedily covers the harmonic-critical edges and triplet-critical triangles, and a hybrid variant of HodgeCover pairs it with off-the-shelf weight pruning on survivors. On three open-weight Sparse MoE backbones under aggressive expert reduction, HodgeCover matches state-of-the-art learning-free baselines on the expert-reduction axis, leads on the aggressive-compression frontier of the hybrid axis, and uniquely balances retained mass across all four Hodge components. These results show that exposing the harmonic kernel of a learned MoE structure changes which compressor wins at the regime that matters most.

ru.title: Гармоническое ядро для оптимального слияния экспертов
ru.desc: В работе предложен новый метод сжатия разреженных слоёв Mixture-of-Experts, основанный на анализе гармонических ядер из симплициальной топологии. Авторы выявили фундаментальное ограничение существующих компрессоров: три эксперта могут быть попарно совместимы, но образовывать неразложимый цикл при слиянии, что невидимо для попарных метрик. Решение состоит в применении разложения Ходжа лапласиана симплициального комплекса, где вершины — эксперты, рёбра — барьеры слияния KL, грани — барьеры троек. Предложенный алгоритм HodgeCover жадно покрывает критические с точки зрения гармоники рёбра и треугольники, достигая компромисса между сжатием и качеством без переобучения модели.

en.title: Optimizing Sparse MoE Compression with Harmonic Kernel Analysis
en.desc: This paper presents a new method for compressing Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers using harmonic kernel analysis from simplicial topology. The approach identifies optimal patterns for merging experts, allowing for efficient inference without the need for retraining the model. It addresses a key challenge where experts can be pairwise compatible but not jointly mergeable, which has hindered existing compression methods. By applying Hodge decomposition to the expert relationships, the proposed method, HodgeCover, effectively balances compression and performance, achieving state-of-the-art results in expert reduction and aggressive compression scenarios.

zh.title: 利用谐波核优化稀疏专家混合层的压缩
zh.desc: 本文提出了一种新颖的稀疏专家混合层压缩方法，利用简单拓扑中的谐波核分析来识别最佳的专家合并模式，从而实现高效推理而无需重新训练。稀疏专家混合（MoE）层通过少数专家来处理输入数据，学习无关的压缩方法可以在不重新训练的情况下降低推理成本。研究表明，现有的压缩方法在处理专家合并时存在结构性盲点，导致无法有效识别可合并的三元组。通过引入HodgeCover算法，本文在多个稀疏MoE模型上实现了与最先进的学习无关基线相匹配的性能，并在压缩效率上取得了显著进展。

papers.title: ChangeFlow -- Latent Rectified Flow for Change Detection in Remote Sensing
papers.abstract: Abstract ChangeFlow presents a generative framework for remote sensing change detection that synthesizes change masks in latent space using rectified flow, achieving improved accuracy and robustness through sampling-based prediction ensembling.  AI-generated summary Remote sensing change detection (RSCD) aims to localise changes between two images of the same geographic region. In practice, change masks often follow region-level annotation conventions rather than purely local appearance differences, making them context-dependent and occasionally ambiguous. Most state-of-the-art methods utilise per-pixel discriminative classification, which produces a single prediction per input and fails to explicitly model the changed region as a coherent whole. A natural alternative is generative formulation, which can model a distribution of plausible masks, enabling sampling to capture ambiguity and encourage global consistency. However, existing generative RSCD approaches typically lag behind strong discriminative baselines due to the high computational cost of pixel-space generation and the complexity of their conditioning mechanisms. To address the limitations of prior discriminative and generative methods, we propose ChangeFlow, a generative framework that reformulates change detection as the synthesis of a change mask in latent space via rectified flow. ChangeFlow is guided by a structured yet lightweight conditioning signal, and its stochastic design naturally supports sampling-based prediction ensembling. Namely, aggregating multiple predicted change masks improves robustness, while sample agreement provides a practical confidence estimation that highlights ambiguous regions. Across four benchmarks, ChangeFlow achieves an average F1 of 80.4\%, improving by 1.3 points on average over the previous best method, while maintaining inference speed comparable to recent strong baselines. Project page: https://blaz-r.github.io/changeflow_cd
affiliations: University of Ljubljana, Faculty of Computer and Information Science, Slovenia

ru.title: Генеративное обнаружение изменений в скрытом пространстве через выпрямленный поток
ru.desc: ChangeFlow предлагает генеративный подход к обнаружению изменений на спутниковых снимках путём синтеза масок изменений в скрытом пространстве с использованием выпрямленного потока. В отличие от традиционных дискриминативных методов, которые выдают одиночное предсказание, генеративная формулировка моделирует распределение плаузибильных масок, что позволяет захватить неоднозначность и обеспечить глобальную согласованность. Метод использует облегченный условный сигнал и поддерживает ансамблирование предсказаний через сэмплирование, что улучшает робастность и даёт оценку уверенности. На четырёх бенчмарках ChangeFlow достигает среднего F1-скора 80.4%, превосходя предыдущие методы на 1.3 пункта при сохранении скорости инференса.

en.title: ChangeFlow: Enhancing Remote Sensing Change Detection with Generative Modeling
en.desc: ChangeFlow is a new framework for detecting changes in remote sensing images by generating change masks in a latent space using rectified flow. It improves accuracy and robustness by using a sampling-based approach to combine multiple predictions, which helps to capture ambiguity and ensure consistency in the detected changes. Unlike traditional methods that focus on per-pixel classification, ChangeFlow models the entire changed region, making it more effective in handling context-dependent changes. The framework has shown significant improvements in performance on various benchmarks while maintaining fast inference speeds.

zh.title: ChangeFlow：提升遥感变化检测的生成框架
zh.desc: ChangeFlow 是一个用于遥感变化检测的生成框架，它通过修正流在潜在空间中合成变化掩码，从而提高了准确性和鲁棒性。该方法利用基于采样的预测集成，能够更好地捕捉变化区域的模糊性，并促进全局一致性。与传统的逐像素判别分类方法相比，ChangeFlow 通过生成模型来处理变化掩码，克服了计算成本高和条件机制复杂的问题。实验结果表明，ChangeFlow 在四个基准测试中平均 F1 值达到 80.4%，比之前的最佳方法提高了 1.3 个点，同时保持了与最新强基线相当的推理速度。

papers.title: OmniHumanoid: Streaming Cross-Embodiment Video Generation with Paired-Free Adaptation
papers.abstract: Abstract OmniHumanoid enables cross-embodiment video generation by factorizing motion transfer and embodiment-specific adaptation, allowing scalable adaptation to new humanoid embodiments using unpaired data.  AI-generated summary Cross-embodiment video generation aims to transfer motions across different humanoid embodiments, such as human-to-robot and robot-to-robot, enabling scalable data generation for embodied intelligence. A major challenge in this setting is that motion dynamics are partly transferable across embodiments, whereas appearance and morphology remain embodiment-specific. Existing approaches often entangle these factors, and many require paired data for every target embodiment, which limits scalability to new robots. We present OmniHumanoid, a framework that factorizes transferable motion learning and embodiment-specific adaptation. Our method learns a shared motion transfer model from motion-aligned paired videos spanning multiple embodiments, while adapting to a new embodiment using only unpaired videos through lightweight embodiment-specific adapters. To reduce interference between motion transfer and embodiment adaptation, we further introduce a branch-isolated attention design that separates motion conditioning from embodiment-specific modulation. In addition, we construct a synthetic cross-embodiment dataset with motion-aligned paired videos rendered across diverse humanoid assets, scenes, and viewpoints. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that OmniHumanoid achieves strong motion fidelity and embodiment consistency, while enabling scalable adaptation to unseen humanoid embodiments without retraining the shared motion model.
affiliations: Show Lab, National University of Singapore

ru.title: Универсальная генерация движений для любых гуманоидных тел без переобучения
ru.desc: OmniHumanoid — это фреймворк для генерации видео с передачей движений между разными гуманоидными телами (человек-робот, робот-робот). Ключевая идея заключается в факторизации обучаемой модели: авторы разделяют обучение общего движения, которое передаётся между телами, и специфичной для каждого тела адаптации через лёгкие адаптеры. Метод обучается на парных видео с выровненными движениями от нескольких тел, а затем адаптируется к новому телу только на непарных видео без переобучения общей модели. Для уменьшения помех между компонентами авторы используют специальный механизм внимания с изолированными ветвями, а также создали синтетический датасет с выравненными движениями.

en.title: Seamless Motion Transfer Across Humanoids
en.desc: OmniHumanoid is a framework designed for generating videos that transfer motion between different humanoid forms, such as from humans to robots. It addresses the challenge of separating motion dynamics, which can be shared, from the unique appearance and structure of each embodiment. By using a combination of paired and unpaired data, the framework allows for scalable adaptation to new humanoid forms without needing extensive retraining. The innovative branch-isolated attention mechanism further enhances the model's ability to maintain motion fidelity while adapting to specific embodiment characteristics.

zh.title: 跨体态视频生成的创新解决方案
zh.desc: OmniHumanoid 是一个用于跨体态视频生成的框架，它通过分解运动转移和特定体态的适应来实现。这种方法允许在没有配对数据的情况下，针对新的类人形体进行可扩展的适应。OmniHumanoid 通过轻量级的特定体态适配器，利用未配对的视频来适应新的体态，同时保持运动转移模型的共享性。实验结果表明，该框架在运动保真度和体态一致性方面表现出色，能够在不重新训练共享运动模型的情况下，适应未见过的类人形体。

papers.title: GQLA: Group-Query Latent Attention for Hardware-Adaptive Large Language Model Decoding
papers.abstract: Abstract Group-Query Latent Attention (GQLA) enables efficient inference across different hardware by exposing multiple decoding paths from a single set of trained weights, supporting both high-performance and commodity GPUs without retraining.  AI-generated summary Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA), the attention used in DeepSeek-V2/V3, jointly compresses keys and values into a low-rank latent and matches the H100 roofline almost perfectly. Its trained weights, however, expose only one decoding path - an absorbed MQA form - which ties efficient inference to H100-class compute-bandwidth ratios, forfeits tensor parallelism along the head axis, and yields no Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) gain on commodity inference GPUs such as the export-restricted H20. We propose Group-Query Latent Attention (GQLA), a minimal modification of MLA whose trained weights expose two algebraically equivalent decoding paths over the same parameters: an MQA-absorb path identical to MLA's, and a GQA path with a per-group expanded cache. The runtime picks the path that matches the target hardware - no retraining, no custom kernels - so a single set of GQLA weights pins the rooflines of both H100 (MQA-absorb, s_q=1) and H20 (GQA + MTP, s_q=2), while supporting up to 8-way zero-redundancy tensor parallelism on the GQA path. To avoid pretraining from scratch we extend TransMLA into TransGQLA, which converts a pretrained GQA checkpoint into a GQLA model; on LLaMA-3-8B it compresses the per-token KV cache to 28.125% of the GQA baseline on the MQA-absorb path while structurally preserving GQA-level traffic on the per-group path.
affiliations: Institute for Artificial Intelligence, Peking University

ru.title: Один набор весов - множество путей: универсальный трансформер для любого железа
ru.desc: Статья представляет Group-Query Latent Attention (GQLA) - модификацию механизма внимания Multi-head Latent Attention, которая позволяет эффективно работать на разных типах оборудования без переобучения. GQLA открывает несколько путей декодирования из одного набора обученных весов: путь MQA-absorb оптимизирован для высокопроизводительных GPU класса H100, а путь GQA с расширенным кэшем подходит для менее мощного оборудования типа H20. Авторы предлагают метод TransGQLA для конвертации предварительно обученных моделей в формат GQLA, что позволяет достичь 28% размера кэша ключей-значений на базовой модели LLaMA-3-8B. Такой подход обеспечивает универсальность: один набор весов автоматически выбирает оптимальный путь вычислений в зависимости от целевого оборудования.

en.title: Efficient Inference for All GPUs with GQLA
en.desc: The paper introduces Group-Query Latent Attention (GQLA), a novel approach that allows efficient inference on various hardware setups without the need for retraining. GQLA builds on the Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) framework by providing two decoding paths from the same set of trained weights, optimizing performance for both high-end and commodity GPUs. This method enhances tensor parallelism and enables Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) gains on less powerful GPUs, which were previously limited by the MLA's single decoding path. Additionally, the authors present TransGQLA, a technique to convert pretrained models into GQLA, significantly reducing cache size while maintaining performance.

zh.title: 群查询潜在注意力：高效推理的新路径
zh.desc: 本文提出了一种名为群查询潜在注意力（GQLA）的新方法，旨在提高不同硬件上的推理效率。GQLA通过从一组训练好的权重中暴露多个解码路径，支持高性能和普通GPU的推理，而无需重新训练。与多头潜在注意力（MLA）相比，GQLA提供了两条代数上等价的解码路径，从而在不同硬件上优化性能。通过将预训练的GQA检查点转换为GQLA模型，GQLA在保持结构的同时显著压缩了每个令牌的KV缓存。

papers.title: Forgetting That Sticks: Quantization-Permanent Unlearning via Circuit Attribution
papers.abstract: Abstract Quantization reverses machine unlearning effects, revealing a fundamental sparsity-permanence tradeoff where parameter updates fall below quantization bin widths, leading to the development of MANSU to achieve both forgetting and retention preservation under compression.  AI-generated summary Standard unlearning evaluations measure behavioral suppression in full precision, immediately after training, despite every deployed language model being quantized first. Recent work has shown that 4-bit post-training quantization can reverse machine unlearning; we show this is not a tuning artefact but a systematic dual failure: gradient-based methods that achieve meaningful forgetting lose it under compression, while methods that survive quantization barely change the model. Both failures trace to the same root cause: across all baselines, per-parameter updates lie 47-828x below the NF4 quantization bin width; updates diffused across billions of parameters cannot clear quantization bin boundaries, a consequence we formalize as a sparsity-permanence tradeoff. We present MANSU (Mechanistic-Aligned Null-Space Unlearning), which resolves both modes by combining causal circuit attribution to isolate the minimal forget-set subgraph, circuit-restricted null-space projection with a diagonal-Fisher retain bound, and a per-parameter magnitude floor guaranteeing quantization survival by construction. We additionally introduce Circuit Attribution Divergence (CAD), a mechanistic verification metric distinguishing structural erasure from behavioral suppression, a distinction existing metrics cannot make. Across multiple model families and hazard benchmarks, MANSU is the first method to jointly satisfy all four properties with margin on each (meaningful forgetting, retain preservation, non-positive PTQ gap, and structural erasure), while gradient-based baselines recover up to +0.05 accuracy under compression.

ru.title: Квантизация и забывание: как сохранить оба при сжатии моделей
ru.desc: В статье исследуется проблема того, что квантизация параметров нейросетей нивелирует эффекты машинного забывания, которые были достигнуты в полной точности. Авторы выявили фундаментальный компромисс между разреженностью обновлений и их устойчивостью к квантизации: градиентные обновления оказываются в 47-828 раз меньше ширины bin'ов при 4-битной квантизации, что приводит к потере забывания при сжатии модели. Для решения этой проблемы предложен метод MANSU, который использует анализ причинных цепочек и проекцию на нулевое пространство, гарантируя как эффективное забывание, так и сохранение знаний под квантизацией. Также введена новая метрика Circuit Attribution Divergence для проверки структурного стирания информации в отличие от простого поведенческого подавления.

en.title: MANSU: Balancing Forgetting and Retention in Quantized Models
en.desc: This paper discusses the challenges of machine unlearning in the context of quantized models, where traditional methods fail to effectively forget information after compression. It identifies a tradeoff between sparsity and permanence, where updates to model parameters are too small to overcome quantization thresholds, leading to ineffective unlearning. The authors propose a new method called MANSU, which combines advanced techniques to ensure both effective forgetting and retention of important information even after quantization. Additionally, they introduce a new metric, Circuit Attribution Divergence (CAD), to better evaluate the success of unlearning methods by distinguishing between structural erasure and mere behavioral suppression.

zh.title: 量化与遗忘的平衡：MANSU的创新之路
zh.desc: 量化技术会逆转机器遗忘的效果，揭示了参数更新与量化之间的稀疏性和持久性之间的权衡。研究表明，4位后训练量化会导致机器遗忘的失效，这并不是简单的调优现象，而是系统性的双重失败。我们提出了MANSU（机制对齐的零空间遗忘），通过结合因果电路归因和零空间投影，解决了遗忘和保留的矛盾。MANSU是首个在多个模型和基准测试中同时满足所有四个属性的方法，展现了在压缩下的有效遗忘和保留能力。

papers.title: Physics-R1: An Audited Olympiad Corpus and Recipe for Visual Physics Reasoning
papers.abstract: Abstract Three undocumented issues in multimodal-physics evaluation—train-eval contamination, translation drift, and MCQ saturation—are identified through comprehensive auditing, revealing significant distortions in vision-language reasoning measurement.  AI-generated summary We audit the multimodal-physics evaluation pipeline end-to-end and document three undetected construction practices that distort how the field measures vision-language reasoning: train-eval contamination, translation drift, and MCQ saturation. (1) Public training pools (UGPhysics-Train, SciInstruct, MMK12) pass single-stage 5-gram-Jaccard audits with zero hits across all six public physics evals; a three-stage audit (Jaccard -> mxbai-embed-large cosine -> Haiku-4.5 LLM-judge) surfaces 134 near-duplicates and 4,846 paraphrase candidates in SciInstruct alone. (2) A 17-pp Sonnet 4.5 delta on 59 paired Estonian-English olympiad problems (30.5% vs. 13.6%; sign test p=0.011, McNemar p=0.021, paired bootstrap 95% CI [+5.1, +28.9] pp). (3) A 46-pp format-and-novelty gradient on identical Sonnet weights between MCQ (79.7% on PhyX) and open-ended olympiad evaluation (33.4% on PhysOlym-A). We release four artifacts addressing these gaps: PhysCorp-A (6,432-record three-stage-audited multimodal corpus), PhysR1Corp (2,268-record closed-form RL pool), PhysOlym-A (500-problem, 99.8% novel-source held-out olympiad eval with native difficulty labels and an EN/ET bilingual subset), and Physics-R1, a reference GSPO+DAPO recipe cold-started from Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking. Across 3 seeds, Physics-R1 lifts the audited corpus over the 8B base by +18.3 pp on PhysOlym-A liberal (8.0 -> 26.3 +/- 1.7; 7.1 pp behind Sonnet 4.5), +15.7 pp on PhysReason (23.9 -> 39.6 +/- 6.4; ahead of Qwen3-VL-32B and Gemini 2.5 Pro), +6.9 pp on OlympiadBench-Physics (46.2 +/- 1.5), and +4.1 pp on PhyX MCQ (77.8 +/- 0.3).

ru.title: Чистая оценка мультимодального разума: от загрязнения данных к честным физическим задачам
ru.desc: Исследование выявило три критические проблемы в оценке мультимодальных моделей на физических задачах: загрязнение тренировочных и тестовых наборов данных, смещение при переводе между языками и искусственное завышение результатов при использовании множественного выбора. Авторы предложили трёхэтапный аудит с использованием embedding-моделей и LLM-судей для обнаружения дублей и парафраз в обучающих корпусах. Они создали новые чистые датасеты и эталонный набор задач с высокой новизной исходных источников, включая билингвальное подмножество на эстонском языке. Разработанная модель Physics-R1 продемонстрировала значительный прирост производительности на аудитированных тестовых наборах благодаря применению методов reinforcement learning и специализированной обработке физических задач.

en.title: Enhancing Accuracy in Multimodal-Physics Evaluation
en.desc: This paper identifies three critical issues in the evaluation of multimodal-physics models that affect the accuracy of vision-language reasoning assessments. The authors highlight problems such as train-eval contamination, where training data inadvertently influences evaluation results, and translation drift, which can skew performance metrics across different languages. They also discuss MCQ saturation, where multiple-choice questions may not effectively measure model capabilities. To address these issues, the authors introduce new datasets and evaluation methods that enhance the reliability of multimodal assessments.

zh.title: 提升多模态物理评估的准确性
zh.desc: 本文揭示了多模态物理评估中的三个未记录问题：训练-评估污染、翻译漂移和多项选择题饱和。这些问题通过全面审计被识别，显示出在视觉-语言推理测量中存在显著扭曲。研究还发布了四个新数据集，以解决这些问题并提高评估的准确性。通过这些改进，新的评估方法在多个基准测试中表现出色，显著提升了模型的性能。

papers.title: Follow the Mean: Reference-Guided Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Abstract Flow matching enables controllable generation through example-based adaptation via conditional endpoint mean adjustment, offering training-free and parametric guidance methods for style and content control.  AI-generated summary Existing approaches to controllable generation typically rely on fine-tuning, auxiliary networks, or test-time search. We show that flow matching admits a different control interface: adaptation through examples. For deterministic interpolants, the velocity field is solely governed by a conditional endpoint mean; shifting this mean shifts the flow itself. This yields a simple principle for controllable generation: steer a pretrained model by changing the reference set it follows. We instantiate this idea in two forms. Reference-Mean Guidance is training-free: it computes a closed-form endpoint-mean correction from a reference bank and applies it to a frozen FLUX.2-klein (4B) model, enabling control of color, identity, style, and structure while keeping the prompt, seed, and weights fixed. Semi-Parametric Guidance amortizes the same idea through an explicit mean anchor and learned residual refiner, matching unconditional DiT-B/4 quality on AFHQv2 while allowing the reference set to be swapped at inference time. These results point to a broader direction: generative models that adapt through data, not parameter updates.

ru.title: Управление генерацией через адаптацию к примерам без переобучения
ru.desc: В статье предлагается метод контролируемой генерации на основе flow matching, который позволяет адаптировать предобученные модели через примеры без переобучения. Ключевая идея заключается в том, что поле скорости детерминированного интерполянта зависит только от условного среднего значения конечной точки, поэтому сдвиг этого среднего изменяет саму траекторию генерации. Авторы предлагают два подхода: Reference-Mean Guidance - безпараметрический метод, который вычисляет коррекцию среднего в замкнутом виде и применяется к замороженной модели, и Semi-Parametric Guidance - метод, который амортизирует эту идею через явный якорь среднего и обучаемый уточняющий модуль. Оба подхода позволяют контролировать стиль, контент и структуру сгенерированных изображений, меняя только набор reference примеров без изменения весов модели.

en.title: Adapt Generatively: Control Through Examples!
en.desc: This paper introduces flow matching as a novel method for controllable generation in machine learning, allowing for adaptation through examples without the need for training. It highlights how the velocity field in flow matching can be adjusted by changing the conditional endpoint mean, which directly influences the generated output. The authors propose two approaches: Reference-Mean Guidance, which uses a fixed model to control various attributes like color and style based on a reference set, and Semi-Parametric Guidance, which incorporates a learned component for improved quality. Overall, the study emphasizes a shift towards generative models that can adapt using data rather than requiring parameter updates.

zh.title: 通过示例适应实现可控生成
zh.desc: 流匹配技术通过示例适应实现可控生成，提供了无训练和参数指导的方法来控制风格和内容。与传统的微调和辅助网络方法不同，流匹配允许通过示例进行适应。通过改变参考集，可以简单地引导预训练模型，从而实现可控生成。我们提出了两种实现方式：参考均值引导和半参数引导，前者无需训练，后者则在推理时允许更换参考集。

papers.title: Raster2Seq: Polygon Sequence Generation for Floorplan Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Abstract Raster2Seq reconstructs floorplan vector graphics from raster images using sequence-to-sequence modeling with autoregressive decoding guided by learnable anchors for spatial attention.  AI-generated summary Reconstructing a structured vector-graphics representation from a rasterized floorplan image is typically an important prerequisite for computational tasks involving floorplans such as automated understanding or CAD workflows. However, existing techniques struggle in faithfully generating the structure and semantics conveyed by complex floorplans that depict large indoor spaces with many rooms and a varying numbers of polygon corners. To this end, we propose Raster2Seq, framing floorplan reconstruction as a sequence-to-sequence task in which floorplan elements--such as rooms, windows, and doors--are represented as labeled polygon sequences that jointly encode geometry and semantics. Our approach introduces an autoregressive decoder that learns to predict the next corner conditioned on image features and previously generated corners using guidance from learnable anchors. These anchors represent spatial coordinates in image space, hence allowing for effectively directing the attention mechanism to focus on informative image regions. By embracing the autoregressive mechanism, our method offers flexibility in the output format, enabling for efficiently handling complex floorplans with numerous rooms and diverse polygon structures. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks such as Structure3D, CubiCasa5K, and Raster2Graph, while also demonstrating strong generalization to more challenging datasets like WAFFLE, which contain diverse room structures and complex geometric variations.

ru.title: Авторегрессивная реконструкция планов помещений через последовательное предсказание с пространственным вниманием
ru.desc: Raster2Seq решает задачу реконструкции векторной графики планов помещений из растровых изображений, используя архитектуру sequence-to-sequence с авторегрессивным декодером. Элементы плана (комнаты, окна, двери) представляются как последовательности помеченных полигонов, которые одновременно кодируют геометрию и семантику. Модель использует обучаемые якоря для пространственного внимания, направляя механизм внимания на информативные области изображения и предсказывая следующий угол полигона на основе признаков изображения и ранее сгенерированных углов. Метод достигает лучших результатов на стандартных бенчмарках и хорошо обобщается на сложные датасеты с разнообразными структурами помещений.

en.title: Transforming Floorplans: From Raster to Vector with Precision
en.desc: Raster2Seq is a machine learning model that converts raster images of floorplans into structured vector graphics using a sequence-to-sequence approach. It employs an autoregressive decoder that predicts the next corner of a polygon based on image features and previously generated corners, guided by learnable anchors for spatial attention. This method effectively captures the geometry and semantics of complex floorplans, making it suitable for tasks like automated understanding and CAD workflows. The model achieves state-of-the-art results on various benchmarks, demonstrating its ability to generalize to diverse and challenging datasets.

zh.title: 高效重建复杂平面图的智能方法
zh.desc: Raster2Seq是一种将栅格图像重建为平面图矢量图形的方法，采用序列到序列的建模方式，并通过自回归解码器和可学习的锚点引导空间注意力。该方法将平面图重建视为一个序列到序列的任务，其中平面图元素（如房间、窗户和门）被表示为标记的多边形序列，编码几何和语义信息。通过自回归解码器，模型能够根据图像特征和先前生成的角点预测下一个角点，从而有效地关注图像中的重要区域。我们的研究在多个标准基准上取得了最先进的性能，并在处理复杂的房间结构和几何变体时表现出良好的泛化能力。

papers.title: AuralSAM2: Enabling SAM2 Hear Through Pyramid Audio-Visual Feature Prompting
papers.abstract: Abstract AuralSAM2 integrates audio into SAM2 through an AuralFuser module that generates sparse and dense prompts, enhancing cross-modal influence while maintaining interactive segmentation efficiency.  AI-generated summary Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) exhibits strong generalisation for promptable segmentation in video clips; however, its integration with the audio modality remains underexplored. Existing approaches either convert audio into visual prompts (e.g., boxes) via foundation models, or inject adapters into the image encoder for audio-visual fusion. Yet both directions fall short in human-in-the-loop scenarios due to limited prompt accuracy and increased inference overhead. In particular, these adapter-based methods often suffer from audio prompt dilution, where the signal gradually weakens as it propagates through the network. In this work, we propose AuralSAM2, which integrates audio into SAM2 while largely preserving its promptable segmentation capability. Its core module, AuralFuser, fuses audio and visual features to generate sparse and dense prompts. Guided by audio and built upon SAM2's feature pyramid, these prompts propagate auditory cues across visual layers, reinforcing cross-modal influence. To further align modalities, we introduce an audio-guided contrastive loss that emphasises auditory relevance in dominant visual features. Our method achieves notable accuracy gains on public benchmarks with only minimal impact on the interactive efficiency of promptable segmentation. Our code is available at https://github.com/yyliu01/AuralSAM2.
affiliations: Australian Institute for Machine Learning, Adelaide University
Department of Engineering Science, University of Oxford

ru.title: Слышащая сегментация: аудио встречает видение в SAM2
ru.desc: AuralSAM2 расширяет возможности модели Segment Anything Model 2, интегрируя аудиомодальность для улучшенной сегментации видео. Ключевой компонент AuralFuser генерирует разреженные и плотные промпты путём слияния аудио и визуальных признаков, что позволяет эффективно распространять слуховые сигналы через пирамиду признаков. Для лучшего выравнивания модальностей используется контрастивная потеря, управляемая аудио, которая усиливает значимость звуковых сигналов в доминирующих визуальных характеристиках. Метод демонстрирует значительный прирост точности на бенчмарках при сохранении интерактивной эффективности интерпретируемой сегментации.

en.title: Enhancing Video Segmentation with Audio Integration
en.desc: AuralSAM2 is a novel approach that enhances the Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) by integrating audio data through a module called AuralFuser. This module generates both sparse and dense prompts that improve the interaction between audio and visual information, allowing for better segmentation in video clips. The method addresses limitations of previous techniques that either converted audio to visual prompts or used adapters, which often diluted audio signals and increased processing time. By employing an audio-guided contrastive loss, AuralSAM2 effectively aligns audio and visual features, resulting in improved accuracy while maintaining efficient interactive segmentation.

zh.title: 音频与视觉的完美融合
zh.desc: AuralSAM2 是一种将音频集成到 SAM2 模型中的新方法，通过 AuralFuser 模块生成稀疏和密集的提示，增强了跨模态的影响力，同时保持了交互式分割的效率。该方法解决了现有音频与视觉融合技术在提示准确性和推理开销方面的不足，特别是在需要人类参与的场景中。AuralFuser 模块通过音频和视觉特征的融合，生成的提示能够有效传播听觉线索，强化了跨模态的互动。我们的方法在公共基准测试中取得了显著的准确性提升，同时对提示分割的交互效率影响最小。

papers.title: Known By Their Actions: Fingerprinting LLM Browser Agents via UI Traces
papers.abstract: Abstract Website tracking systems can identify the underlying large language model powering web browsing agents with high accuracy through behavioral patterns and timing data.  AI-generated summary As LLM-based agents increasingly browse the web on users' behalf, a natural question arises: can websites passively identify which underlying model powers an agent? Doing so would represent a significant security risk, enabling targeted attacks tailored to known model vulnerabilities. Across 14 frontier LLMs and four web environments spanning information retrieval and shopping tasks, we show that an agent's actions and interaction timings, captured via a passive JavaScript tracker, are sufficient to identify the underlying model with up to 96\% F1. We formalise this attack surface by demonstrating that classifiers trained on agent actions generalise across model sizes and families. We further show that strong classifiers can be trained from few interaction traces and that agent identity can be inferred early within an episode. Injecting randomised timing delays between actions substantially degrades classifier performance, but does not provide robust protection: a classifier retrained on delayed traces largely recovers performance. We release our harness and a labelled corpus of agent traces https://github.com/KabakaWilliam/known_actions{here}.
affiliations: Department of Engineering Science, University of Oxford
Oxford Internet Institute, University of Oxford

ru.title: Веб-сайты могут определить LLM агента по его поведению и таймингам
ru.desc: В работе исследуется уязвимость веб-агентов на основе LLM, которые могут быть идентифицированы сайтами через анализ поведенческих паттернов и временных характеристик взаимодействия. Авторы показали, что с помощью пассивного JavaScript трекера можно определить конкретную модель, лежащую в основе агента, с точностью до 96% F1 на 14 различных frontier LLM. Они демонстрируют, что классификаторы, обученные на действиях агентов, хорошо обобщаются между моделями разных размеров и семействами, и могут делать выводы уже из небольшого количества примеров взаимодействия. Авторы также показали, что хотя добавление случайных задержек в timings затрудняет идентификацию, полной защиты это не обеспечивает, так как классификаторы можно переобучить на задержанных трассах.

en.title: Unmasking LLMs: Identifying Models Through Browsing Behavior
en.desc: This paper investigates how websites can accurately identify the large language model (LLM) behind web browsing agents by analyzing their behavior and timing data. The authors demonstrate that by using a passive JavaScript tracker, they can achieve up to 96% accuracy in classifying the underlying model across various tasks. They also show that classifiers trained on the agents' actions can generalize well, even with limited interaction data. Additionally, while introducing random timing delays can reduce classifier performance, it does not provide a strong defense against model identification.

zh.title: 识别大型语言模型的安全风险
zh.desc: 本论文探讨了网站如何通过行为模式和时间数据准确识别支持网络浏览代理的大型语言模型（LLM）。研究表明，代理的行为和交互时间可以通过被动的JavaScript跟踪器识别出模型，准确率高达96%。此外，训练好的分类器能够跨模型大小和类型进行泛化，且只需少量交互数据即可训练出强分类器。虽然在行为之间注入随机延迟可以降低分类器的性能，但并不能提供有效的保护。

papers.title: MLAIRE: Multilingual Language-Aware Information Retrieval Evaluation Protocal
papers.abstract: Abstract Multilingual information retrieval evaluation protocol MLAIRE separates semantic retrieval accuracy from query-language preference to better assess retrieval utility across mixed-language corpora.  AI-generated summary Multilingual Information Retrieval is increasingly important in real-world search settings, where users issue queries over mixed-language corpora. Existing evaluations mainly reward language-agnostic semantic relevance, treating relevant passages equally regardless of language. Yet retrieval utility also depends on the language of the retrieved passages: users may prefer results they can read and verify in the query language, and query--passage language mismatch can complicate downstream grounding and answer verification in Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems. To evaluate this language-aware dimension, we introduce MLAIRE, a Multilingual Language-Aware Information Retrieval Evaluation protocol that disentangles cross-lingual semantic retrieval from query-language preference. MLAIRE constructs controlled pools with parallel passages across languages, enabling measurement of semantic retrieval accuracy and query-language preference when equivalent translations are available. We propose language-aware metrics, including Language Preference Rate (LPR) and Lang-nDCG, together with a 4-way decomposition separating semantic and query-language preference failures. Evaluating 31 dense, sparse, and late-interaction retrievers, we show that standard metrics obscure distinct behaviors: semantically strong retrievers may return correct content in a non-query language, while retrievers with stronger query-language preference may retrieve less semantically relevant passages.
affiliations: Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Korea University

ru.title: Разделение семантики и языка в многоязычном поиске
ru.desc: В статье представлен протокол MLAIRE для оценки многоязычного поиска информации, который отделяет точность семантического поиска от предпочтения языка запроса. Авторы показывают, что существующие метрики оценки не учитывают важный аспект: пользователи могут предпочитать результаты на языке своего запроса, даже если на других языках есть семантически релевантная информация. Для решения этой проблемы предложены новые метрики Language Preference Rate и Lang-nDCG, а также четырёхмерная декомпозиция, разделяющая ошибки семантического поиска и предпочтения языка. Экспериментальное тестирование 31 различных retriever'ов продемонстрировало, что стандартные метрики скрывают важные различия в поведении систем поиска.

en.title: Enhancing Multilingual Retrieval: Separating Meaning from Language Preference
en.desc: The paper introduces MLAIRE, a new evaluation protocol for Multilingual Information Retrieval that distinguishes between semantic retrieval accuracy and user preference for query language. It highlights the importance of considering both the meaning of retrieved content and the language in which it is presented, as users often prefer results in their query language. The protocol uses controlled pools of parallel passages to measure these two aspects separately, allowing for a clearer understanding of retrieval performance. Additionally, it proposes new metrics like Language Preference Rate (LPR) to better assess how well retrieval systems meet user language preferences alongside semantic relevance.

zh.title: 多语言检索评估的新标准
zh.desc: 多语言信息检索评估协议MLAIRE将语义检索准确性与查询语言偏好分开，以更好地评估混合语言语料库中的检索效用。现有评估主要关注语言无关的语义相关性，忽视了用户对可读性和验证性的需求。MLAIRE通过构建跨语言的平行段落池，测量语义检索准确性和查询语言偏好。我们提出了语言偏好率（LPR）和Lang-nDCG等语言感知指标，以更全面地评估检索系统的表现。
